scenes.text: Tim arrived at the Whispering Woods, his eyes wide with wonder. He walked along a soft moss path as sunlight danced through the leaves above. As he ventured deeper, he heard a gentle whisper. 'Hello?' Tim asked, but only rustling leaves replied.
scenes.image_description: A curious boy walking alone on a mossy path in bright, sun-dappled woods

scenes.text: Following the whispers led Tim to an ancient oak tree. He noticed something unusual carved into its trunk - a small face with twinkling eyes. As he reached out to touch it, the face moved! It was Whisper, a playful forest spirit who loved making friends.
scenes.image_description: An ancient oak tree with a smiling wooden face carved into its trunk

scenes.text: Tim and Whisper spent the day exploring together. They played tag around giant mushrooms, laughed as they tried to catch colorful butterflies, and shared stories under the starlit sky. As night fell, Tim felt a warmth in his heart, knowing he'd made a friend for life.
scenes.image_description: A boy and a wooden spirit playing among glowing stars and tall mushrooms
